overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk across a neon-lit bridge, through a covered pedestrian tunnel with cyan lighting, and emerging onto a palm-lined city street. The scene features futuristic cyberpunk architecture with distinctive teal neon illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian bridge with parallel neon ceiling lights

events.description: entering covered tunnel from open bridge walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the bridge toward the tunnel entrance, with vehicle traffic visible to the left

entered.detail: parallel lines of bright cyan neon lights running lengthwise along the bridge ceiling
dark rectangular opening at the end of the bridge leading into the covered walkway
metal safety barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle lanes
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible below and to the left of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated pedestrian bridge at night, illuminated by distinctive parallel cyan neon strips overhead. The camera walks forward toward a dark tunnel entrance, with metal railings on the left separating the walkway from moving traffic below.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with industrial concrete finish

events.description: two pedestrians come into view standing ahead in the tunnel walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the long tunnel corridor, passing red emergency lights mounted on the right wall

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing and conversing in the middle of the tunnel path near the exit

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall with horizontal panel lines and industrial finish
small rectangular red warning lights spaced periodically along the right wall
exposed beam ceiling with fluorescent tube lighting and cyan accent lights
concrete dividers with yellow and black stripes separating pedestrian and vehicle areas

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a long, enclosed pedestrian tunnel with concrete walls and an industrial ceiling. Red emergency lights dot the right wall while yellow barriers line the left. Toward the end of the segment, two pedestrians become visible standing ahead in the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with palm trees and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered tunnel into open air with palm trees and buildings visible
walking across a zebra-striped pedestrian crosswalk

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing along the sidewalk, crossing a marked pedestrian crosswalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky, indicating a warmer climate or coastal city
white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road surface
elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
low-rise commercial buildings with illuminated windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the tunnel into an open urban street, revealing palm trees and a zebra crosswalk. The environment transitions from enclosed to open air, with an elevated overpass visible ahead and buildings lining the right side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit elevated bridge through a confined industrial tunnel and out into an open urban street. It begins on a futuristic pedestrian walkway under parallel cyan neon strips, moving forward past metal railings and flowing traffic toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the enclosure, the environment shifts to a concrete corridor defined by an industrial ceiling, red emergency lights, and yellow barriers before approaching two pedestrians standing ahead. The scene then opens as the camera exits the tunnel, transitioning from the enclosed space into the open air of a city street. Finally, the view expands to reveal palm trees, a zebra crosswalk, and an elevated overpass framed by buildings lining the right side of the road.
